mapper.sql: id, script_id, script_version_id, step_id, field_scope, field_path, field_key, stable_field_key, field_name, data_type, required, array_flag, sensitive, description, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by, deleted
mapper.update: UPDATE field_config SET step_id = #{stepId}, field_scope = #{fieldScope}, field_path = #{fieldPath}, field_key = #{fieldKey}, stable_field_key = #{stableFieldKey}, field_name = #{fieldName}, data_type = #{dataType}, required = #{required}, array_flag = #{arrayFlag}, sensitive = #{sensitive}, description = #{description}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND script_id = #{scriptId} AND script_version_id = #{scriptVersionId} AND deleted = 0
